name: morning_report
description: Pre-market morning report. Covers regime context, every tracked asset proportionally, and actionable setups for the day.

regime_duration_days.description: How many days the current regime has persisted.

regime_narrative.description: Living read of the current regime. Not a label but a considered assessment with context.

narrative.description: Analytical read for this asset. Dwell on what's interesting, move quickly past what isn't.

assets.description: Per-asset analytical reads. Cover every tracked asset.

trigger_condition.description: Condition type that activates this setup.

trigger_level.description: Price or indicator value that triggers the setup.

trigger_field.description: For indicator triggers: indicator name (e.g. 'rsi_14_1h'). Null for price triggers.

target_level.description: Price target if the setup plays out.

invalidation_level.description: Price level that invalidates this setup.

confidence.description: Confidence in this setup (0.0-1.0). Be honest — this feeds calibration tracking.

narrative.description: Why this setup matters and what makes it compelling right now.

setups.description: Actionable setups. Machine-readable trigger conditions feed the live evaluation loop. May be empty if nothing is setting up.

market_narrative.description: Overall market editorial. The analyst's morning briefing — what matters today.

magnitude.description: How significant in market terms. Pure impact assessment.

surprise.description: How unexpected given the current read.

regime_relevance.description: Does this potentially change the bigger picture.
